description: User taps '✖ Cancel' on an AskUserQuestion inline keyboard (rq:cxl — cancel/reject form)
derived_rationale: rq:cxl shares the same ctx shape as rq:sub. Payload differs only in callbackQuery.data: rq:cxl:{chatId}:{tid}. Confirmed from relay.ts:695 handler.
trigger: AskUserQuestion form shown; user taps '✖ Cancel' without submitting
notes: callbackQuery.data format: rq:cxl:{chatId}:{tid} (tid=0 for private chats without forum topics)
On cancel: form is removed from pendingRelayForms, form.reject(new Error('user cancelled')) called
The onQuestion() Promise rejects → handleAskUserQuestion catch block fires → proc.kill()
This is the cancel path that previously caused a freeze (process left alive with stdin open)
After the freeze fix: proc.kill() in the catch block ensures proc.exited resolves promptly
Bug to detect: if proc.kill() is NOT called after reject, claudeStream hangs on proc.exited

message.text:
❓ Question 1 of 1

Which database should we use?
